entries.subject: Velora
entries.content: Velora was renamed to Etihad Airport Services in early 2025 following acquisition by Etihad Aviation Group.

entries.subject: Etihad Airport Services
entries.content: Official email domain is @etihadairportservices.com. Previous domain @velora.com is being deprecated.

entries.subject: security_workflow
entries.content: Security questionnaire must always be sent before any commercial proposal. This is a hard requirement for compliance.

entries.subject: enterprise_threshold
entries.content: Enterprise opportunities above $100,000 require a Security Review before progressing past Discovery stage.

entries.subject: enterprise_tier
entries.content: Enterprise tier pricing: $750 per user per year for 500+ users. Volume discounts apply at 1000+ users.

entries.subject: data_residency
entries.content: EU data residency requirements must be flagged to infrastructure team and confirmed in writing before contract signing.

entries.subject: NovaTech Solutions
entries.content: NovaTech Solutions is a German SaaS company. All contracts must include GDPR compliance clauses. Primary contact: Laura Simmons (CEO).
